ValidationRule.description: Check to ensure that the training can only be completed when Method, Type, Product, Educator Type and Conducted date are filled.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT($Permission.Bypass_Validation_Rules), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Live_Training', ISPICKVAL( Training_Stage__c , "Completed"), OR( ISPICKVAL(Training_Method__c, ""), ISPICKVAL(Training_Type__c, ""), ISPICKVAL(Product__c, ""), ISPICKVAL(Educator_Type__c, ""), ISBLANK(Training_Conducted_Date__c)
) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: To complete a training, Method, Type, Product, Educator Type, and Training Conducted Date must be filled.
